data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of 'Mandatory justification text' but did not provide any evidence confirming its implementation or existence. The linked use case specifies the need for this justification text, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to this requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the presence of 'Mandatory justification text'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the presence of 'Mandatory justification text'.
